text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, July 07. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
